narrative:
Ada South (precinct in Hardin County) has 1,069 registered voters, with 57.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.7 percentage points.
